>Description:
You are a seahorse and you want to go to the moon!

WWW: http://www.imitationpickles.org/barbie/

Resend while the png have first PR destoroyed.

Generated manually, tested with RedPorts and port test, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: new
>How-To-Repeat:
>Fix:

--- .shar begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	barbie_seahorse_adventures
#	barbie_seahorse_adventures/Makefile
#	barbie_seahorse_adventures/pkg-descr
#	barbie_seahorse_adventures/distinfo
#	barbie_seahorse_adventures/pkg-plist
#
echo c - barbie_seahorse_adventures
mkdir -p barbie_seahorse_adventures > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - barbie_seahorse_adventures/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >barbie_seahorse_adventures/Makefile << '38c004ca12e769eb6381a5b63423edfe'
X# New Ports collection makefile for:	barbie_seahorse_adventures
X# Date created:		2012-05-11
X# Whom:			nemysis@gmx.ch
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	barbie_seahorse_adventures
XPORTVERSION=	1.0
XCATEGORIES=	games
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.imitationpickles.org/barbie/files/
XDISTNAME=	barbie-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=	nemysis@gmx.ch
XCOMMENT=	You are a seahorse and you want to go to the moon!
X
XLICENSE=	GPLv2
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/pygame/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-game
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/barbie-${PORTVERSION}
X
XUSE_PYTHON=	yes
XNO_BUILD=	yes
X
XPORTDOCS=	CHANGES.txt LEVELS.txt NOTES.txt README.txt TODO.txt
X
Xpost-patch:
X	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's,/usr/bin/python,${PYTHON_CMD},' \
X		leveledit.py tileedit.py)
X	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${RM} *.py.bak)
X
Xdo-install:
X# Scripts
X	@${PRINTF} "#!/bin/sh\n\ncd ${DATADIR} &&\
X		exec ${PYTHON_CMD} run_game.py \"$$\@\"\n" > ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}.sh
X	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}.sh ${PREFIX}/bin/${PORTNAME}
X
X# Executable
X	${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
X	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/*.py ${DATADIR}
X
X# Data
X	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} "data lib" ${DATADIR})
X#	${INSTALL_DATA} ${FILESDIR}/${PORTNAME}.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps
X
X# Documentation
X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
X	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
X.  for f in ${PORTDOCS}
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${f} ${DOCSDIR}
X.  endfor
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
